title: Rapiers
description: Rapiers is a very small Texture Pack in which the swords are obviously replaced by Baguett- na, don't believe it, by rapiers XD.
body:
Rapiers is a very small Texture Pack in which the swords are obviously replaced by Baguett- na, don't believe it, by rapiers XD.

Why?, I don't know, I like rapiers, they catch my attention.

The Bedrock version will be available soon, at MCPEDL, and for Java at PlanetMinecraft, CurseForge, and Modrinth
If there are any mistakes, forgive me, I did it based on looking at the names of the files and having faith, since I don't have Minecraft of any kind, so I couldn't test, but I didn't want to be someone who stays with only an "active" project.

With nothing more to say, I bid you farewell.

![Welcome to Rapiers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e8acb794ddc5d63afa3b8a6116af730979068dc.png)
